Key Achievements & Progress: Successfully replaced the council’s website in July 2020 with excellent feedback. Established an online form standards framework aligning to GDS standards.
Future Strategic Priorities (2021-24): Implement a new customer experience platform with online forms; integrate with national mygov.scot for single sign-on; launch new Customer Experience Strategy.
Efficiency & Savings Impact: Reduction in manual admin time; 156 hours staff time saved in birth registrations alone.

Efficiency & Savings Impact: Total savings of over £1.2m delivered via Fit for the Future; 80% decrease in face-to-face visits.

Future Strategic Priorities (2021-24): Replace Housing ICT system; develop Roads asset management system for mobile access; explore IoT for smart street lighting and waste management.
Efficiency & Savings Impact: Significant reduction in admin time (over 1 day per week); potential for route-optimisation efficiencies.

Key Achievements & Progress: Shifted to digital learning during pandemic (95% engagement); launched national Parent Portal link for 50% of pupils; handled £3.9m in Parent Pay transactions.

Programme or Project Name: Council Tax and Benefits ICT System
Key Achievements & Progress: System went live in December 2020; completed first annual billing in March 2021 using remote testing via Teams.
Future Strategic Priorities (2021-24): Stabilise the new system; refine end-to-end processes for efficiencies; implement a customer portal later in 2021.
Efficiency & Savings Impact: Ease of reporting and access to data; faster processing times for customers; reduction in face-to-face cash payments by 82%.
